caption: In a professional office setting, a man in a dark suit, white shirt, and red patterned tie stands at the head of a conference table, addressing a small group of people. He gestures emphatically with his right hand, pointing his finger upward and outward to emphasize a point. Seated at the table are three other people: a woman in a green cardigan over a purple top, a man in a white dress shirt and light-colored tie who rests his chin on his hand with a skeptical expression, and a blonde woman in a grey sweater. On the light-colored table, there are a few pink cups and a white disposable coffee cup. The background consists of plain beige walls and a framed picture. As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit continues his animated speech, shifting his hand gestures slightly while the seated observers remain largely still and attentive.
